intro: Selenipedium paulistanum, also known as the orchid Selenipedium, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, which may aid in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Selenipedium paulistanum include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
